title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1590 - Nonparentage as defense
text:
454.1590.  Nonparentage as defense. — A party whose parentage of a child has been previously determined by or pursuant to law may not plead nonparentage as a defense to a proceeding under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
